data.name: AddExistingVaultDescription
data.value: Seleccione una caja fuerte de su dispositivo

data.name: AutoLockDescription
data.value: Bloquear todas las cajas fuertes al bloquear el dispositivo

data.name: AutoStart
data.value: Ejecutar automáticamente al iniciar el sistema

data.name: AutoStartDescription
data.value: Iniciar SecureFolderFS al iniciar el sistema

data.name: ClearTracesDescription
data.value: Wipes data from caches and recently accessed list

data.name: ChangelogDescription
data.value: Ver las últimas notas de la versión actual

data.name: ChangelogError
data.value: Se ha producido un error al cargar el registro de cambios.

data.name: CopyVersionMessage
data.value: Seleccione que versión copiar al portapapeles

data.name: CreateNewVaultDescription
data.value: Crear nueva caja fuerte de SecureFolderFS

data.name: DisableRecentAccess
data.value: Desactivar la lista de acceso reciente

data.name: DisableRecentAccessDescription
data.value: Deshabilitar temporalmente la lista de archivos recientes cuando se desbloqueen las cajas fuertes

data.name: FileSystemProviderDescription
data.value: Elija el tipo de sistema de archivos virtual preferido

data.name: LatestVersionInstalled
data.value: Ya está instalada la última versión

data.name: LockVaultDescription
data.value: Bloquea esta caja fuerte de forma segura y cierra el panel de control

data.name: MasterKeyDescription
data.value: This is the recovery key which you can use to regain access to this vault. Losing it will prevent you from resetting your password.

data.name: NoEncryption
data.comment: Used as an option when choosing vault encryption

data.name: NoVaultsMessage
data.value: No ha añadido ninguna caja fuerte todavía. ¡Cree una nueva o añada una existente para empezar!

data.name: OpenLogLocationDescription
data.value: Opens {0} where the log file is located

data.name: OpenVaultFolderDescription
data.value: Abrir carpeta automáticamente cuando la caja fuerte se desbloquee

data.name: PrivacyPolicyDescription
data.value: Ver la declaración de la política de privacidad

data.name: RemoveFromList
data.value: Eliminar caja fuerte de la lista

data.name: RestoreLastSessionDescription
data.value: Iniciar en la caja fuerte seleccionada previamente

data.name: Retry
data.comment: Used to retry a failed action

data.name: SelectVaultPath
data.value: Seleccionar ruta de la caja fuerte

data.name: SocialDescription
data.value: Preguntar, sugerir y debatir sobre SecureFolderFS

data.name: TelemetryDescription
data.value: Recopilar informes anónimos de errores, bloqueos y datos de uso

data.name: TelemetryInfoBarMessage
data.value: Telemetry data is anonymized and helps us improve app stability and performance.

data.name: ThirdPartyLicensesDescription
data.value: Ver las bibliotecas de terceros utilizadas por SecureFolderFS

data.name: VaultAdded
data.value: Se ha añadido la caja fuerte

data.name: VaultPropertiesDescription
data.value: Ver información sobre este caja fuerte

data.name: SelectedMayNotBeSupported
data.value: Selected vault may not be supported

data.name: SelectedToBeOverwritten
data.value: The selected vault will be overwritten

data.name: SelectedWillCreate
data.value: A new vault will be created in the selected folder

data.name: AdvancedOptions
data.comment: Use a short-hand name, if possible

data.name: Setup
data.comment: Another word for 'configuration'. Used primarily when setting up other authentication methods

data.name: Security
data.comment: Used to describe the authentication method used in a vault. (See Vault Properties section)

data.name: RecoveryCodesDescription
data.value: Access recovery codes for this vault in case you forget your credentials

data.name: ChangeCredentialsDescription
data.value: Change how you log in into this vault

data.name: EnterRecoveryKey
data.value: Enter the recovery key for this vault

data.name: VaultNeedsMigration
data.value: The vault needs to be migrated before it can be used

data.name: RecoveryKeyTip
data.value: You can recover your vault using Recovery Key in case you lose or forget your credentials

data.name: RemoveAuthenticationQuestion
data.value: The following authentication method will be removed. Do you wish to continue?

data.name: RemoveAuthenticationTip
data.value: You can always re-add it later

data.name: VaultReadOnlyMode
data.value: The vault is in read-only mode

data.name: EmptyRecycleBinDescription
data.value: Recycle bin is empty. Delete some items to see them here.

data.name: RepairDescription
data.value: During repair, your vault will be set into read-only mode.

data.name: UnsavedChangesDescription
data.value: You have made changes to the file. Do you want to save them now?

data.name: OnboardingWelcomeSubtitle
data.value: To get you started, this presentation will guide you through the most notable features of the app.

data.name: OnboardingDashboardSubtitle
data.value: Quickly manage your vault from a top-down dashboard view. Modify credentials, browse files, and check the integrity of your files.

data.name: OnboardingDataSourcesSubtitle
data.value: In addition to storing vaults on your device, you can also connect to other cloud storage providers.

data.name: OnboardingAuthenticationSubtitle
data.value: With our robust security, you choose how you access your files. Whether it's password, Windows Hello, or a key file — your data remains protected and readily available, tailored to your preferences.

data.name: OnboardingEncryptionSubtitle
data.value: Your files are encrypted using industry-standard AES-256 encryption. Even file and folder names are protected, ensuring that your sensitive documents remain completely private.

data.name: OnboardingFileSystemSubtitle
data.value: Thanks to our seamless virtual file system engine, you can access your data worry-free without compromising speed or security. Your encrypted vault appears as a regular drive.

data.name: AboutToMigrate
data.value: You're about to migrate a vault

data.name: AuthenticationUnavailableOrExpired
data.value: The configured authentication method is unavailable or has expired. Please use your recovery key.

data.name: DokanyNotDetected
data.value: Dokany has not been detected. Please install Dokany (v{0}) to continue.

data.name: DokanyIncompatible
data.value: The installed version of Dokany is incompatible. Please install the requested version of Dokany (v{0}).

data.name: GenerateNewNameChanged
data.value: A custom name will be applied

data.name: ItemsLoseOriginalName
data.value: Items in this directory will lose their original name

data.name: WinFspNotDetected
data.value: WinFsp has not been detected. Please install WinFsp (v{0}) to continue.

data.name: WinFspIncompatible
data.value: The installed version of WinFsp is incompatible. Please install the requested version of WinFsp (v{0}).

data.name: FileHasCorruptedChunks
data.value: Parts of the file are corrupted and will be reset

data.name: FileHeaderCorrupted
data.value: File header is corrupted and the file will be deleted

data.name: DeviceLinkInstructions
data.value:
1. Click "More Options" (three dots) in SecureFolderFS mobile app
2. Select "Device Link" option
3. Toggle "Enable Device Link"
4. Ensure both devices are on the same network

data.name: DeviceLinkIsRequestingCredentials
data.value: This device is requesting to use your Device Link credentials to unlock a vault.

data.name: DeviceLinkAcceptWarning
data.value: Only accept if you initiated this request

data.name: DeleteDeviceLinkCredentialWarning
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the credential '{0}'? This will revoke access for the paired device. Make sure to remove the authentication method in the desktop application first.

data.name: DeviceLinkDescription
data.value: Device Link allows you to create credentials that can be used to sign in to your vault on desktop without needing to enter your password.

data.name: FileSystemOffersImprovedExperience
data.value: Improved user experience, reliability, and performance

data.name: BuiltinFileSystem
data.value: One of the built-in file systems

data.name: DokanyDescription
data.value: Dokany offers better integration and reliability

data.name: WinFspDescription
data.value: WinFsp offers better performance and reliability

data.name: ItemDeletionDescription
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {0} item(s)?

data.name: ItemsExceedRecycleBinSize
data.value: The deleted items exceed the available space in the recycle bin. Do you want to permanently delete {0} item(s) instead?

data.name: IntroPrefix
data.value: By continuing, you agree to our

data.name: SelectLocationOfVault
data.value: Select a location of your vault

data.name: DeviceRequestingToPair
data.value: {0} is requesting to pair to create credentials

data.name: ArchiveFormatNotSupported
data.value: This archive format is not supported for extraction

data.name: ConnectToRemoteVault
data.value: Before logging in, establish a connection to the remote vault.

data.name: PlusDescription
data.value: Support independent development and unlock every feature.

data.name: PlusUnlimitedVaultsDescription
data.value: Create and manage more than two vaults at a time.

data.name: PlusDeviceLinkDescription
data.value: Sync desktop vault credentials securely with the mobile app.

data.name: PlusSecurityKeyDescription
data.value: Protect vaults with hardware-grade security keys.

data.name: PlusFileRecoveryDescription
data.value: Recover accidentally deleted files with ease.

data.name: PlusVaultShortcutsDescription
data.value: Jump straight into any vault from a desktop shortcut.

data.name: PlusSupportDevelopment
data.value: Achieve full potential · Supports independent development

data.name: ChooseNewVaultMode
data.value: Choose how you want to add a new vault.

data.name: ItemAlreadyExists
data.value: Item with the same name already exists
